examples: His face shows, as he stares at the fire, a blend of fastidiousness and intransigence.
Quietly elegant perfume, delicacy without fastidiousness, makes females even more charming.
Many people can't stand his working style, and even misunderstand his hardworking as fastidiousness .
One night, I had grown so miserable about the bathroom that my fastidiousness overwhelmed my fury.
If Clementi had a touch of middle-aged fastidiousness, Ravi was fully a teen-ager: rangy, physical, with a taste for public regard.
